## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the gap. -->

## Affected document and clause

**Document:**
**Clause / Principle:**

## Description of the gap

<!-- What is ambiguous, missing, or underspecified?
What would two independent implementers disagree about when reading this clause? -->

## Deployment scenario

<!-- Describe a realistic deployment in which this gap causes a problem.
What does an implementer do? What does an auditor see? -->

## Proposed resolution

<!-- Optional. How would you close this gap?
Clarification / new clause / new invariant? -->

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — allows compliance bypass
- [ ] High — creates significant implementation ambiguity
- [ ] Medium — minor ambiguity, workarounds exist
- [ ] Low — editorial / clarity improvement
